Related Entities

  • hospital BUFFALO HOSPITAL 5-star overall rating
  • hospital CENTRACARE HEALTH - MONTICELLO
  • hospital COMMUNITY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH HOSPITAL ANNANDALE
  • snf GOOD SAMARITAN SOCIETY - HOWARD LAKE 5-star, 32 beds
  • snf The Estates at Delano LLC 3-star, 39 beds
  • snf ANNANDALE CARE CENTER INC 5-star, 42 beds
  • snf Cokato Manor 4-star, 56 beds
  • snf Park View Care Center 5-star, 92 beds
  • snf Cura of Monticello 3-star, 67 beds
  • snf LAKE RIDGE CARE CENTER OF BUFFALO, INC. 5-star, 56 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
